creator.title: Creator
creator.subtitle: Your Mr.FOX Creator guide — what makes us different, what you get, and how to start

intro.title: Why be a Creator on Mr.FOX?
intro.description: Mr.FOX is not just another profile on a giant feed — it is an ecosystem where you get your own site, app, and revenue channels. Fans can vote, send gifts, watch live, and support you directly in one place.

items.title: Multiple revenue streams
items.description: Vote, Gift, Live, Chat, voice/video calls, and subscriptions — full monetization in one stack, not ads alone.

items.title: Fans reach you faster
items.description: Fans download the Mr.FOX app and reach multiple Creator sites in ≤ 3 taps — no scattered links.

items.title: Launch quickly
items.description: Ready-made platform types with CMS, mobile app, and payments — no need to build everything from scratch.

items.title: A platform that feels yours
items.description: From multi-creator niche hubs to a solo official platform for one Creator.

rows.label: Revenue
rows.fox: Vote · Gift · Live · Chat · Subscription — fans pay Creators directly
rows.others: Mostly ads, tips, or platform-controlled commission

rows.label: Fans
rows.fox: One app reaches many Creator platforms across the Mr.FOX network
rows.others: Fans chase separate apps, links, and channels

rows.label: In-app activities
rows.fox: Turn activities on or off freely — choose only the features you want, nothing forced
rows.others: Features are set by the platform — little room to customize, often mandatory

rows.label: Getting started
rows.fox: Pick a platform type and launch fast with team support
rows.others: Build yourself, wait for invite, or compete in one crowded feed

registration.title: How to register the app
registration.description: How to register the app and fill in Creator details in the video — using CupE as an example.
registration.posterAlt: Download Mr.FOX app — King of Creator Platform
registration.caption: Mr.FOX app registration guide for Creators
registration.placeholder: Add a YouTube link in creator.guide.registration.videoId

items.title: Pick your platform format
items.description: See the 3 types below — Creator Specific, Community, and The Contest — and choose what fits your goal.

items.title: Wait for team approval
items.description: Some sites don't require waiting — it depends on the platform type you choose.

items.title: Set up your platform
items.description: We help configure profiles, Vote/Gift/Live pricing, content rules, and branding before launch.

items.title: Launch to your fans
items.description: Fans download the app, follow, vote, send gifts, and start monetization right away.

formats.title: 3 Platform Types
formats.description: Pick the type that fits your goal — Creator, Community, or Contest — then open each for full details.

types.fit: Creators in one niche — e.g. FOXY, CupE — many Creators, one category
Communities where every member can post and participate — e.g. Silom
Contest platforms — contestants post entries, fans vote and support

about.title: About Mr.FOX
about.subtitle: Mr.FOX is an 18+ creator platform hub — uniting Creator, Community, and Contest sites

vision.label: Vision
vision.headline: Creators earn directly from their fans
vision.body: Build an ecosystem where Creators earn directly from fans through scalable standard platforms
highlights: Multiple sites across Creator · Community · Contest
Creators own their community and revenue
Launch new sites with standard Platform Types

mission.label: Mission
mission.headline: A data-driven engine for growth
mission.body: Develop data-driven Showcase + Engine — scale from 10 to 100+ apps by adding database records only
highlights: Standard templates for every use case
Full CMS / Back Office for content teams
Scale without rebuilding the core architecture

values.title: Creator First
values.description: Every feature is designed to help Creators earn and grow sustainably

values.title: Platform by Design
values.description: Standard templates launch new platforms fast without starting from zero

values.title: Connected Ecosystem
values.description: Apps, communities, and monetization work together in one Mr.FOX ecosystem

response.title: Response time
response.desc: We typically reply within 2–3 business days. For urgent app issues, choose Support as the subject.

steps.title: Send your message
steps.description: Fill out the form and pick the subject that best matches your inquiry.

steps.title: We receive it
steps.description: Your message reaches the Mr.FOX team and is logged for follow-up.

steps.title: Routed to the right team
steps.description: We assign Business, Partnership, Support, or General based on your subject.

steps.title: Reply by email
steps.description: Our team responds within 2–3 business days (Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00).

faq.question: How long until I hear back?
faq.answer: Usually within 2–3 business days. For urgent app issues, choose Support as the subject or call 02-9575771 ext. 75 during business hours.

faq.question: What's the fastest way to reach you?
faq.answer: Call or email support@mrfox.com during business hours, Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00. For app issues, select Support in the form.

faq.question: What's the difference between Support and Business?
faq.answer: Support is for app usage, accounts, and existing services. Business Inquiry is for organizations or brands interested in using the Mr.FOX platform or consulting on new projects.

legal.privacyIntro: Mr.FOX is committed to protecting your personal data under applicable privacy laws (PDPA).
legal.termsIntro: By using the Mr.FOX Showcase website, you agree to these terms.
legal.dataCollectionBody: We collect information when you contact us or use the CMS — no payment data is stored on Showcase.
legal.usageBody: Showcase content is informational. Real transactions happen in the separate Engine app.
legal.contactBody: For privacy inquiries, please use the Contact page.
